summary: Full testing of 3 new P1 features plus regression. All 27 backend API tests pass (100%). All P1 features working correctly in UI.

issues: Bold text (**text**) may not render with visible weight difference in dark mode - could be font-weight issue

passed_tests: Backend: User login with valid credentials
Backend: DELETE /categories/{id} - works for empty category (P1-3)
Backend: DELETE /categories/{id} - fails for category with children (P1-3)
Backend: DELETE /categories/{id} - fails for category with documents (P1-3)
Backend: GET single document by ID
Backend: Document CRUD flow (Create -> Read -> Update -> Delete)
Backend: Search results include content snippets (P1-2)
Backend: Search finds documents by content, not just title (P1-2)
Frontend: Dashboard home shows category cards
Frontend: New page button opens editor with split-pane preview (P1-1)
Frontend: Editor preview toggle 'Hide preview'/'Show preview' works (P1-1)
Frontend: Live preview renders markdown in real-time (P1-1)
Frontend: Search dialog opens via sidebar button
Frontend: Search results show content snippets (P1-2)
Frontend: 'Manage categories' button opens category manager dialog (P1-3)
Frontend: Category manager shows parent categories with subcategories (P1-3)
Frontend: Can create new top-level category (P1-3)
Frontend: Can create subcategory under parent (P1-3)
Frontend: Can rename category via edit button (P1-3)
Frontend: Document viewer shows breadcrumb, title, content, TOC
Frontend: Mermaid diagrams render as SVG
Frontend: Bookmarks page loads and works

details: Preview panel renders markdown: code, lists, headings in real-time
Search dialog opens via sidebar button and Ctrl+K
Results show content snippets below document titles
Search matches content, not just titles
Dialog shows parent categories and subcategories
Create new top-level or sub-category works
DELETE returns 400 for non-empty category (has children or documents)

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about span elements in table structure and select options - caused by React DevTools extension injection, not code issue
App.js is ~870 lines - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all P1 features and regression tests pass)

seed_data_creation: Test categories created and deleted during UI tests for P1-3 feature testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P1 features (split-pane editor, search with snippets, category manager) are working. 27 backend tests including new P1 feature tests. Test user: test@test.com / test1234. Backend test file updated with PUT/DELETE category tests and search snippet tests.
